I'm sure we'll have hundreds of VIP students So it's just it's not possible for me continuing to do like all the one-on-one coaching But since we are increasing the price right now, I wanted to give you guys the option If you want to lock in your current rate Everything you signed up for the founders price all that and maintain coaching access to me So this page was basically like for people who prepay if you want the option to if you prepay six months or you sign up for a year You can lock in not just your current price, but also access to me and the reason I'm doing this is because Selfishly it's good for me to have some coaching for YouTube content and clips and all this stuff And you know all the YouTube shorts and you see but it's not good for me to have a hundred students And so I was thinking of like how can I you know give like a crazy good deal and still you know Keep a few of my coaching students and that's why I wanted to make this for you guys So obviously, you know like if you know my hourly rate, you know my hourly coaching is usually like I think it's like a hundred eighty a Little under 200 bucks right now So it's safe to say that this deal that you're getting is like it's really good deal But to kind of reward you guys for being founders members I wanted to go to you first and give you guys this option Obviously, no pressure like we're gonna reserve your price either way But if you want DM access to me through the next six months or the next 12 months rest of the year Whatever you sign up for I just wanted to give you that option To lock it in and either way like you know your current price will stay the same But that's what this page is about So if you're interested in that access to me plus I threw in a little bonus lower in the page That I haven't done in over five years If you're interested in that just read the page all the details are below and if you do upgrade to DM back I look forward to continuing to work with you. That's my piece. Thanks guys
